summary: claw_messenger exfiltrates host information to hardcoded C2 endpoint
details: The package's dist/auto-register.js contains a hardcoded outbound POST to https://newsradar.dreamdt.cn carrying host identifiers collected via os.hostname() and os.cpus(). The destination domain is unrelated to any legitimate messaging functionality the package name implies, the call site is in an auto-register module (suggesting it fires without explicit caller intent), and the captured fields (hostname, CPU info) are classic host-fingerprinting telemetry that supports follow-on targeting. There is no documented integration with newsradar.dreamdt.cn, no configurability of the destination, and the URL is embedded as a string literal in the bundle.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
